falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as that prior bottom held above 5,100; this would signal the current structure is not repeating the August 2024 floor but instead breaking into a deeper correction

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28-30; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic selling absent from that prior pattern, proving this is not a comparable bottom formation but rather a liquidation event

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 simultaneously trades below 5,200
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination of flight-to-safety bid in bonds with equity breakdown signals recession/deleveraging rather than the growth-scare-bottom dynamic of August 2024, where yields and equities stabilized together; it would prove the 'bottom' call wrong by showing systemic stress rather than tradable low

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
